reflections: Farming is rewarding when the weather is good
The village is well-stocked with food now

observations: Gathered good quality wood from the forest (+8 wood)
Found some stone near the forest edge (+2 stone)
Alice is a reliable farmer who keeps the village fed
reflections: With more wood, I can craft tools for the village

observations: Bob is a skilled blacksmith, could teach me about crafting
The village has limited magical resources
Explored eastern ruins, found an old journal (+0 gold donated to village)
The ruins hold secrets of the old civilization
The journal speaks of a hidden spring in the north
reflections: Ancient knowledge is worth more than gold
The journal's secrets could help the village
memory.currentGoal: share journal findings with villagers and explore the hidden spring

events.message: Alice heads to the farm to harvest crops
Bob ventures to the forest to gather wood for forging
Carol explores the eastern part of the village seeking magic
Alice returns from the farm with a bountiful harvest (+8 food)
Bob returns from the forest with wood and stone (+8 wood, +2 stone)
Carol discovers ancient ruins in the east and finds a mysterious journal
Ancient knowledge uncovered! Carol's discovery enriches village wisdom.
Alice returns from the farm with another good harvest (+8 food)
Bob heads to his forge to craft tools from the gathered wood
Carol shares the journal's secrets with the village and prepares to seek the hidden spring
